fact_nuggets.text: Cud Chew (Japanese: Cud Chew) is an Ability introduced in Generation IX.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability effect may be in need of research. Reason: Version 1.3 of SV corrected a glitch where Cud Chew would activate every other turn. Can multiple berries simultaneously be in the queue to be re-eaten? You can discuss this on the talk page. If a Pokemon with Cud Chew eats a Berry or is affected by a Flung Berry, its effect will activate again at the end of the next turn.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability effect may be in need of research. Reason: Version 1.3 of SV corrected a glitch where Cud Chew would activate every other turn. Can multiple berries simultaneously be in the queue to be re-eaten? You can discuss this on the talk page. If a Pokemon with Cud Chew eats a Berry or is affected by a Flung Berry, its effect will activate again at the end of the next turn.
Causes the Pokemon to reuse an already consumed Berry at the end of the next turn.
